title: ISO 20022 Data Dictionary
notes: Conceptual vocabulary used to shape account, amount, code, date, and message metadata.

title: ISO 20022 Catalogue of Messages
notes: Used only as a structural reference for mock payment order fields; this workbook is not ISO-certified.

title: BIAN Service Landscape 10.0
notes: Reference for banking service-domain separation, including corporate payroll and cash-management capabilities.

title: BIAN Payment Initiation Capability
notes: Reference for payer/payee, payment instruction, validation, and scheduled payment fields.

title: FATF Transparency and Beneficial Ownership
notes: Reference for keeping beneficial-ownership data adequate, accurate, and up to date in the mock legal checks.

title: FATF Best Practices on Beneficial Ownership for Legal Persons
notes: Reference for mock UBO verification, source-of-information, and update-timeliness fields.

title: SHB Corporate Expert Workspace Multi-Agent Proposal
notes: Primary scope reference for Planner, Product, Legal, Operations, evidence, guardrail, approval, and audit datasets.

title: Synthetic Banking Operations Dataset
notes: All customers, people, accounts, balances, transactions, documents, and events are fabricated for testing. Do not use for production decisions.
